name: Tom Petersen
formerRole: Technical Marketing Director, GeForce at NVIDIA Corporation
connectionToCompany: Tom Petersen worked at NVIDIA for over two decades as a Technical Marketing Director focused on GeForce products, operating within Jeff Fisher's GeForce organization. He left NVIDIA to join Intel's graphics division
sourceNote: Publicly known NVIDIA GeForce technical marketing figure; departure to Intel widely covered in tech press
